note: Filenames in this Kaggle HaGRID-30k subset are per-image IDs (16-char alphanumeric), NOT per-subject UUIDs. Therefore unique-basename count == unique-image count. True per-subject grouping requires the original HaGRID metadata (user_id/subject_id), which is NOT present in this 30k Kaggle slice. The current code groups synthetic augmentations of the SAME source image together (which prevents augmentation-leakage but does not prove subject-leakage prevention).
